teamMembers.name: Justin Stark
teamMembers.title: Owner & Lead Agent
teamMembers.bio: With over 7 years of experience in the insurance industry, Justin founded Pontotoc Insurance Agency to provide personalized service to the local community. He specializes in all lines of insurance and is committed to finding the best coverage at competitive rates.

teamMembers.name: Brandon Gonzales
teamMembers.title: Senior Licensed Insurance Agent & Client Solutions Strategist
teamMembers.bio: Brandon brings a unique backround from the respiratory and nursing field(s). He has helped hundreds of families find the right coverage for their needs and is passionate about educating clients about their options.

teamMembers.name: Jake Wingo
teamMembers.title: Licensed Insurance & Annuity Specialist
teamMembers.bio:
Jake brings nearly a decade of experience in customer support, operations management, and business transactions to his role as a licensed insurance agent. Before stepping into the insurance world, Jake held leadership roles at Fastenal, where he excelled in inventory management, client relationship stewardship, and operational efficiency. 

Though new to insurance, Jake has a deep understanding of business dynamics, market behavior, and investment principles. He’s quickly found a passion for annuities and life insurance — pairing his knowledge of financial growth with a strong desire to help clients protect what matters most. As a long-time friend and trusted professional, Jake is committed to building lasting relationships and delivering high-value solutions. His philosophy within the world of business is to, as he often quotes, "Live Serving Others."
